payload.answer: What specifically do you want to learn about knowledge graphs—(1) fundamentals/concepts, (2) how they’re represented (RDF/OWL/property graphs), (3) building/ingesting data, or (4) querying (SPARQL/Cypher) and use cases? Also, what’s your background (beginner/technical) and preferred tooling (e.g., Neo4j, RDF stores, or none yet)?

entity_resolution.reason: No specific entities or prior preferences were provided to store.

details: Captured the user’s general interest in learning more about knowledge graphs without committing any durable facts.

repair_options: Share your goal (e.g., personal research, production system, learning for a class) and any tools you’re considering.
